ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code representing the state */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the county within the state */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "is_sip" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the county is a Special Interest Point (SIP) */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of voting statistics */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the statistics are for */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  "democrat_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the Democratic candidate */,
  "republican_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the Republican candidate */,
  "other_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for other candidates */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage for the election */,
  "last_year_perc" REAL /* Percentage of voters who voted at home in the last year */,
  "this_year_perc" REAL /* Percentage of voters who voted at home in the current year */,
  "diff_in_perc_at_home" REAL /* Difference in the percentage of voters who voted at home between the last and current year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_statistics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code representing the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User's permissions (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting statistics being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistics */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the statistics were accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the statistics */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES voting_statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of demographic data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the demographics are for */,
  "age_median" REAL /* Median age of the county population */,
  "income_median" REAL /* Median household income of the county */,
  "education_high_school_graduation_rate" REAL /* High school graduation rate of the county population */,
  "education_bachelors_degree_or_higher" REAL /* Percentage of county population with a bachelor's degree or higher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_interest_points" (
  "sip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each special interest point */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the special interest point is in */,
  "sip_name" TEXT /* Name of the special interest point */,
  "sip_description" TEXT /* Description of the special interest point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_special_interest_points_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
